What We Do

End-to-End Commercial
Cleaning Solutions

Tailored cleaning programs for every type of commercial property across South Florida.

Office Cleaning

Daily, weekly or nightly service for corporate offices, coworking spaces, and business suites. Desks, restrooms, break rooms — all covered.

Retail Store Cleaning

Immaculate floors, display areas, fitting rooms, and entryways — before or after business hours, without disrupting your customers.

Shopping Mall Support

High-traffic corridor maintenance, food court sanitation, common area upkeep, and restroom service for shopping centers.

Post-Construction Cleaning

Detailed removal of construction dust, debris, and residue. We prepare your new or renovated space for opening day — spotless and safe.

Floor Care & Deep Cleaning

Stripping, waxing, buffing, and sealing for all floor types. Periodic deep cleans that restore surfaces to like-new condition.

Restroom & Sanitation

Commercial-grade disinfection, odor control, and supply restocking. Health-code compliant, ADA-ready at every visit.

Why Prime2H

The Standard South Florida
Businesses Trust

We don't just clean — we protect your brand, your reputation, and your clients' first impressions.

Zero Missed Shifts — Guaranteed

Our crews show up every single time. We operate with the same reliability you expect from your own team.

Licensed, Insured & Background-Checked

Every team member is vetted, trained, and covered. Your property and people are always protected.

Custom Plans Around Your Schedule

We work before, during, or after your business hours — daily, nightly, or on-demand. Your terms.

Commercial-Grade Products & Protocols

EPA-approved products, documented procedures, and health-code compliance on every job.
